Bumjun Park Statistics Major @ University of Wisconsin-Madison

Bio

Hi! My name is Bumjun Park. I am from Seongnam, South Korea, and I am a Statistics major at the University of Wisconsin-Madison. I am a native speaker of English and Korean, with competencies in French and Spanish. My academic interests include spatial statistics, environmental statistics, biostatistics and econometrics.
